Order of Victim Restitution or CR-110 & Abstract of Judgment for Restitution (CR-111)

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT STAY/BWSTAY:07-22-20/X:CR-110 AND 111 ARE FILED FROM PREVIOUSLY ORDERED RESTITUTION/X:DEFENDANT HAS PROVIDED PROOF THAT SHE HAS STARTED PARENTING CLASSES/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT RE:PARENTING CLASSES/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/CCU/

/CAL:PTD PARENTRING CLASS PROGRESS REPORT & CR110 CR111 FILING/CTORD:PTD TO SUPPLY THE COURT WITH A PROGRESS REPORT ON THE CONTINUED DATE/TEXT:BENCHWARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO08-18-20/X: BAIL SET AT $5,000/CONTD:5K BW STAY& CR110 CR111 FILING/DOP/

/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 2D/CTS 2/WS/X DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLETE PARNTING CLASSES AS DETERMINED AND MONITORED BY THE PRETRIAL DIVERSION DEPARTMENT,/SA4:WALGREENS AT 135 POWELL ST,, SAN FRANCISCO CA/SAORD/X:DEFENDANTSHALL PAY VICTIM RESTITUTION TO WALGREENS IN THE AMOUNT OF $574,00,/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CONTD:PTD PROGRESS RPT AND FILING OF CR110-CR111 IN D30/DOP/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED,/X  THE COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT  TO ADD COUNT 2, PC 487(A) MISDEMEANOR, AS TO DEFENDANT LATRICE LACY,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/IBARRA/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS IS GRANTED,/CTORD:SHERIFF'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING IS TERMINATED/WEAP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 03-05-20/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:MICHAEL WHELAN/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:03-16-20/987,2/WS/WEAP/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE & TRANSPORT BY ACM BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF/DOP/SA1:CHINELO OLORUNFEMI/SAORD3/SA4:WALGREENS AT 135 POWELL STREET IN SF/SAORD/
/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT RE:PARENTING CLASSES/DAWT/FAVRPT/X:PROOF OF COMPLETION PROVIDED/CONTPROB/
